title: Atlas preview nodes concept slug links
problem: Ticket-300 product verdict: atlas preview nodes are plain text; readers cannot navigate to existing /concepts/[slug] detail pages.
acceptance_criteria: Pre-ticket audit written before implementation (medium risk: public site).
/atlas-preview nodes section links labels to /concepts/[slug] when slug exists in public export.
Golden + full pytest + public-site build pass.
rollback_plan: Revert atlas-preview nodes link UI only.
